executive_verdict.primary_failure_mode: Architecture-owned verification is green, but docs owner loop remains red on independent verification; marketing owner loop remains red on independent verification.
executive_verdict.most_urgent_fix: Clear the docs verifier/editorial contradiction and let the active marketing measurement-hold window reach a fresh evidence point before expecting a marketing pass artifact.

audit_metadata.scheduler_inspection_method: direct openclaw cron list --json plus current owner-loop artifacts

live_last_error_details.reddit-pipeline-watchdog: cron: job interrupted by gateway restart
live_last_error_details.agent-architecture-watchdog: cron: job interrupted by gateway restart

owns: bounded timeout reruns and verifier refreshes
syncing research artifacts into the git repo

findings.title: Docs and marketing still own the live red state
findings.mechanism: Docs independent verifier is fail, and marketing independent verifier is fail with measurement-pending evidence.
findings.root_cause: Docs still has unresolved must-fix/verifier drift, while marketing is still under a live measurement hold with no primary-repo adoption delta yet.
findings.recommended_fix: Repair docs inside the docs owner loop, then wait for fresh marketing outcome evidence before another certification attempt.

findings.title: Architecture verifier path is independently green
findings.mechanism: checker=AGENT_ARCHITECTURE_OK, independent_verdict=qualified_pass, verifier markdown shows independently verified pass.
findings.root_cause: Architecture is correctly localizing external blockers instead of masking them.
findings.recommended_fix: Keep freshness-gated independent signoff and fail closed when owner-loop evidence stays red.

findings.title: Live scheduler topology is enabled, with restart residue on two rerunning jobs
findings.mechanism: 20 live jobs, 20 enabled, 4 currently running; last-error residue remains on ['agent-architecture-watchdog', 'reddit-pipeline-watchdog'].
findings.root_cause: Gateway restart interrupted prior runs; the jobs are already rerunning and this is not the primary red state.
findings.recommended_fix: Track this as runtime residue only unless the reruns fail again after the current execution window.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Get the docs owner loop back to independent pass
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Docs remains the clearest hard red blocker.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Removes the docs blocker domain from live health state.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Let the active marketing hold window mature, then rerun marketing independent verification on fresh evidence
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Marketing is red because outcome evidence is still measurement-pending.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Removes the marketing blocker domain once fresh evidence replaces the current fail artifact.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Rerun architecture signoff after owner-loop state materially changes
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Architecture is already localized and independently verified.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Keeps architecture signoff aligned with live owner-loop state.

repairs_applied_this_run.change: Reran competitor analysis so shared market-intelligence evidence is fresh again.
Reran loop_integrity_audit.py and health_monitor.py against current owner-loop artifacts.
Checker passed on the refreshed architecture stack.
Rewrote the architecture audit to match the current live cron topology and current owner-loop blocker state.

independent_verification.summary: Independent verification confirms the repaired architecture verifier now fails closed on stale signoff, the live loop topology/ownership checks remain green, and shared market-intelligence reuse stays machine-verifiable.

what_still_needs_independent_verificatio: Fresh docs independent pass after docs loop repairs the current must-fix/verifier failures.
Fresh marketing independent pass after the active measurement hold yields new outcome evidence.

highest_risk_unresolved_issue.title: Docs and marketing are still red together
highest_risk_unresolved_issue.why: The architecture path is green, but two owner loops still fail their own independent signoff.

notes: Architecture green here means architecture-owned verification is healthy and correctly localizing blockers; it does not mean the full system is globally green.
Persisted disabled jobs are history only; live disabled jobs are zero.
Live cron still shows gateway-restart residue on currently rerunning jobs; this is secondary to the docs/marketing blocker state.
